name: Garden Party tote
description:
HERMÈS Vintage Tote Bag.

A color-blocked take on the Hermès Fourre Tout MM, pairing a deep navy upper panel
panel with a black lower body and vertical navy webbed handles that run the full
height of the bag. Founded in Paris in 1837 by Thierry Hermès, the maison has
always balanced leather mastery with quiet canvas companions - the Fourre Tout
has become an everyday cult piece precisely because it wears its Hermès heritage
so discreetly.

The open top closes with a single silver-tone snap stud at the center, and the
self-lined black canvas interior carries the 'Made in France, 100% Coton' care
label.

Brand: Hermès

Model: Fourre Tout MM

Condition: Good

Condition Details: The canvas shows honest vintage wear with fading and surface
soiling on the black lower panel, some fraying along the top edges and softening
of the webbed handles; structure remains sound, snap closure functional.

Main Color: Black

Accent Color: Navy

Hardware Color: Silver

Material: Canvas (100% cotton)

Made in: France
